{{Quote|Wookiee catamarans are speedy, maneuverable watercraft that use twin repulsorlift engines to race across Kashyyyk's bays and bayous at breakneck speed.|The ''[[Galactic Explorer's Guide]]''|<ref name="Galactic Explorer's Guide">''[[Star Wars: The Galactic Explorer's Guide]]''</ref>}}
The '''Oevvaor jet catamaran''', also referred to as the '''Wookiee catamaran''' or the '''Oevvaor cataraman''', was a well-known [[Wookiee]] vehicle manufactured by [[Appazanna Engineering Works]]. They were named after the [[oevvaor]], a [[Ocean|sea]] creature native to [[Kashyyyk]]. During the [[Battle of Kashyyyk]], the catamarans were used to assist the [[Galactic Republic|Republic]] in defending [[Kachirho]].<ref name="RotS" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:Wookieeflyingcat2.png|thumb|250px|left|Aft view of a Wookiee catamaran on Kashyyyk]]
The Catamaran was a slim, twin-hulled [[Starship|craft]] that skidded over [[Kashyyyk]]'s many [[ocean]]s and seas. Using [[repulsorlift]] arrays, they could ascend to altitudes of up to 1000 [[meter]]s. [[Engine]]s very similar to those of [[podracer]]s propelled them to speeds of up to 370 kilometers per hour. Most of the chassis was made up of [[wroshyr wood]].<ref name=":0">''[[Star Wars Complete Vehicles, New Edition]]''</ref>

==History and use==
The [[Wookiee]] aircraft was named after the [[Oevvaor]], a predatory marine [[reptile]] native to Kashyyyk and known for its speed and territorial ferocity. The prow was made to resemble the ax-like horn of a male Oevvaor.<ref name="CVNE" /> They proved to be invaluable vehicles during their service to the Wookiees, who used them to fly above the [[Wroshyr tree]]s and sail the water bodies of the [[Wawaatt Archipelago]].<ref name="Land, Sea and Air II" />

[[File:QuinlanCatamaran-Encyclopedia.png|thumb|right|300px|Quinlan Vos and several Wookiees make use of a catamaran during the Battle of Kashyyyk.]]
Oevvaor Catamarans were normally used as fishing vessels or sports craft. However, whenever the Wookiee [[homeworld]] was threatened, hundreds of these vessels were conscripted and given makeshift weaponry. The most famous use of these ships was at the [[Battle of Kashyyyk]], where their maneuverability and speed was vital in small arms attacks through [[Confederacy of Independent Systems|Separatist]] lines.<ref name="CVNE" /> Through their service in the Battle of Kashyyyk, the catamarans again proved their usefulness, with<ref name="Land, Sea and Air II" /> [[Jedi General]]<ref name="HC 68">{{HelmetCollectionCite|68|Databank A-Z}}</ref> [[Quinlan Vos]] even working aboard one at some point during the campaign. When the [[Galactic Empire]] began the [[occupation of Kashyyyk]], the [[Kashyyyk resistance]] deployed catamarans.<ref name="Land, Sea and Air II" />
